task.title: Build a GB Studio microgame and launch package
task.description: Create a one-room GB Studio microgame called Boss Raid: Slime Panic. Mercenary should split this into gameplay, pixel art, and video marketing. The gameplay branch must patch the supplied repo. The pixel-art branch must return real artifact refs for the sprite sheet and title card. The video branch must return a teaser clip artifact ref plus launch copy. Keep the three branches aligned around the same core hook, palette, and enemy design.

files.content:
# Slime Panic

Tone: playful pressure.
Audience: people who like tiny retro challenge games.
Deliverables: playable patch, sprite pack, 12-second teaser, launch copy.

reproSteps: Open the supplied GB Studio repo snapshot
Implement one playable room with key, slime, and exit loop
Return the gameplay patch plus supporting art and trailer artifacts
failingSignals.expectedBehavior: The final raid result should include a playable GB Studio patch in patchUnifiedDiff plus synthesized image and video artifacts for the art pack and teaser.
